topic: The 3 sleep cycles you need each night
caption: Did you know you need 3 sleep cycles each night? 🌙 Sleep cycles are crucial for physical and mental restoration. Here are the 3 cycles: N1 (transition to sleep), N2 (light sleep), and N3 (deep sleep). Each cycle lasts around 90-120 minutes. 🕰️ Getting these cycles can improve memory, reduce stress, and boost your immune system. 💪 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🌟💤🏥
